channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
item.description: If you choose to get an extra controller for your Nintendo Switch 2, you can spend a lot — and get a lot in return. Buying Nintendo’s own $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller, for instance, will net you...

item.title: How We Built a Chat AI Agent Into Live Device Testing Sessions
item.description: We ship a cloud device farm — real Android and iOS devices you can control from a browser. Our users are mostly SDETs and QA engineers running Appium tests. The problem we kept hearing: finding...

item.title: Your AI agent is a ticking time bomb. Here's how to defuse it.
item.description: You let your AI coding agent loose on a refactor. Twenty minutes later it's done. You ship. But did you check what it actually did while you weren't watching? Most developers don't. And that's a...

item.title: My Voice Router That Refuses to Think: Pattern‑First Multi‑Agent Orchestration for Sub‑Second Latency
item.description: I built my voice assistant orchestration layer around a stubborn rule: Don't spend an LLM call on a problem that a regex can solve. That reads like common sense until you ship a voice-first UX....

item.title: Flashing and Debugging A Firmware in Detail
item.description: In this tutorial, I will inspect, flash and debug a firmware written for STM32F446RE microcontroller. To accomplish this, we need some dedicated tools: openocd arm-none-eabi-* gdb-multiarch...

item.title: Welcome to Container Harbour! 🚢 Ep.1
item.description: Episode 1: Welcome to Container Harbour! 🚢 Listen. LISTEN. We Need to Talk About Your Apps. 🎤 You know what cracks me up? Every time someone asks “What IS Kubernetes?”, the person answering goes...

item.title: Beyond the Hype: Architecting Scalable Low-Code Platforms for Enterprise Ecosystems
item.description: Beyond the Hype: Architecting Scalable Low-Code Platforms for Enterprise Ecosystems Executive Summary Low-code development has evolved from a departmental productivity tool into a strategic...

item.title: How I Handle 200+ GitHub Notifications Without Losing My Mind
item.description: How I Handle 200+ GitHub Notifications Without Losing My Mind Last Tuesday, I had 247 unread GitHub notifications. By Wednesday afternoon, I'd missed a critical PR review that blocked my team for...

item.title: I almost leaked an API key into ChatGPT, so I built a Chrome extension
item.description: I use AI chats a lot when coding and analyzing logs. A few days ago I almost pasted a real API key into ChatGPT while sharing some logs. I noticed it just before sending. But it made me realize...

item.title: Beyond Simulation: Architecting Enterprise-Grade Digital Twins for Competitive Advantage
item.description: Beyond Simulation: Architecting Enterprise-Grade Digital Twins for Competitive Advantage Executive Summary Digital twin technology has evolved from a conceptual framework to a mission-critical...

item.title: How I Built a VTU SGPA Calculator Using JavaScript
item.description: How I Built a VTU SGPA Calculator Using JavaScript Many VTU students struggle to calculate their SGPA manually after results are announced. To make this easier, I built a simple VTU SGPA...

item.title: Amazon launches its healthcare AI assistant on its website and app
item.description: Health AI can answer questions, explain health records, manage prescription renewals, book appointments, and more.

item.title: How NVIDIA Builds Open Data for AI
Razer’s BlackShark V2 Pro gaming headset is $90, which is a new low price
item.description: If you’re looking for a reliable wireless gaming headset under $100, the Xbox version of the Razer BlackShark V2 Pro is worth a look. Right now, it’s down to a new low of $89.99 ($110 off) at...

item.title: Pokopia Pokédex review: a classic, reimagined
item.description: Thirty years ago, Nintendo struck gold with the release of the original Pokémon games. Soon, kids across the world were introduced to dozens of magical creatures that they could befriend and learn...

item.title: AI-powered apps struggle with long-term retention, new report shows
item.description: AI can drive stronger early monetization for apps, but sustaining value remains the challenge, RevenueCat's latest report finds.

item.title: States’ trial against Live Nation could move forward as soon as next week
item.description: The Live Nation trial is not over yet. Several states look to be headed to trial on their own as soon as Monday unless they hash out a settlement in the next few days. On Tuesday, a day after the...

item.title: Judge blocks Perplexity’s AI agents from shopping on Amazon
item.description: A federal judge has issued an order blocking Perplexity's web browser-based AI agents from placing Amazon orders on a user's behalf, as reported earlier by Bloomberg. In a ruling on Monday, US...

item.title: ChatGPT can now create interactive visuals to help you understand math and science concepts
item.description: Instead of just reading an explanation or looking at a static diagram, users can now engage directly with interactive visuals.

item.title: Slay the Spire II is even better with a friend
item.description: Slay the Spire II launched in early access last week, and it's already an excellent sequel to one of the best roguelikes of all time. In many ways, it's very similar to its predecessor. Like Hades...

item.title: Fake AI Content About the Iran War Is All Over X
item.description: X’s Grok is failing to accurately verify video footage from the Iran conflict and is sharing its own AI-generated images about the war.

item.title: How to Stop AI Data Leaks: A Webinar Guide to Auditing Modern Agentic Workflows
item.description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is no longer just a tool we talk to; it is a tool that does things for us. These are called AI Agents. They can send emails, move data, and even manage software on...

item.title: FortiGate Devices Exploited to Breach Networks and Steal Service Account Credentials
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers are calling attention to a new campaign where threat actors are abusing FortiGate Next-Generation Firewall (NGFW) appliances as entry points to breach victim networks....

item.title: AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents
item.description: AgentMail provides an API platform that lets you give AI agents their own email inboxes, with support for two-way conversations, parsing, threading, labeling, searching, and replying.

item.title: Satechi’s new folding dock adds USB, audio, and video ports to the iPad
item.description: Satechi has announced a redesigned version of the iPad Pro stand with USB-C hub functionality it launched nearly five years ago that's smaller and easier to travel with. The new OntheGo Foldable...

item.title: KadNap Malware Infects 14,000+ Edge Devices to Power Stealth Proxy Botnet
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new malware called KadNap that's primarily targeting Asus routers to enlist them into a botnet for proxying malicious traffic. The malware, first...

item.title: Grammarly will keep using authors’ identities without permission unless they opt out
item.description: Last week, my colleagues discovered that Superhuman's Grammarly had turned me into an AI editor, using my real name, without ever asking my permission. They did the same to my boss Nilay Patel, my...

item.title: The best Mario Day deals we found
item.description: It’s Mario Day, an annual celebration of Nintendo’s mascot. It falls every year on March 10th because the date spells out “MAR10,” but you probably knew that already. Even if you aren’t all that...

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 4.5 with 6x Frame Generation is rolling out at the end of March
item.description: Nvidia's DLSS 4.5 with 6x Multi Frame Generation will be available starting March 31st for users with RTX 50-series GPUs, the company announced on Tuesday. With 6x Multi Frame Generation, Nvidia...

item.title: Thinking Machines Lab inks massive compute deal with Nvidia
item.description: The multi-year deal involves at least a gigawatt of compute power and also includes a strategic investment from Nvidia.
